name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
Friend,

We’re trying to do two big things that haven’t been done in a long time.

1. Win a Democratic majority in the Texas House (last time that happened
was in 2000).
2. Win Texas’ electoral college votes for the Democratic nominee for
President (last time that happened was in 1976).

They’re both important.

Win the State House, and we can begin to dismantle the infrastructure of
voter suppression and have a seat at the table for redistricting in 2021.

Win the 38 electoral college votes and it’s game over for Trump and
Trumpism — and the electoral landscape of this country is forever changed
to our advantage.

If either of these things were easy, or simply a matter of money, we’d
have achieved them by now.

But when you’re up against decades of Republican control, generations of
voter suppression and the inertia of a national party that looks at your
state more like an ATM than a battlefield — nothing about this comes easy.

As important as this work is, as big as the payoff will be, as much as we
need the help, when you’re campaigning in Texas you quickly come to
realize that there is no cavalry, no one is going to ride to the rescue
and save the day.

That’s up to us. We are the cavalry. And it’s the tough, grinding work of
registering and reaching out to voters — one at a time — that Powered by
People is doing that will help us win these elections.

We could use you in this cavalry.

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43025?source=ema20200831-103440&t=1001&akid=103440%2E444211%2E2mTd4B ]Virtual Phone Bank with local candidates and Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43025?source=ema20200831-103440&t=1002&akid=103440%2E444211%2E2mTd4B ]Wednesday, September 2, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43025?source=ema20200831-103440&t=1003&akid=103440%2E444211%2E2mTd4B ]Get more info or RSVP »

Even if you have never volunteered before, or have been too busy until
now, this is the time to sign up. And I’m not asking you to do anything I
won’t be doing. I’ll be on every one of these phone banks to Texas voters,
right next to you.

When you are trying to take back the Texas House and turn the biggest
battleground state, every vote will matter, every registration will
matter, and everyone is needed to make this happen.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42547?t=1004&akid=103440%2E444211%2E2mTd4B ]So, can I count on you?

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=103440%2E444211%2E2mTd4B

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: before bed, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
---
Friend -- We're just hours away from midnight here in Georgia.

August was the month this race really took shape:

_The polls consistently show me leading or statistically tied with my opponent, Senator David Perdue, and experts keep upgrading this race in my favor. And as of last week, Mitch McConnell's super PAC is officially spending more against me than any other Democratic U.S. Senate candidate._

**Friend, it's clear: The institutional GOP is SCARED about our momentum in Georgia.**

**That momentum is nearly unstoppable, friend,_but we're still short of tonight's $100,000 fundraising goal -- and I am going to need your help to close this gap to win._**

**[Friend, can you rush a $20 donation before midnight to push our people-powered campaign to victory?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2b00/5b2c1286/382fbde1/25f0d7ff/3594282795/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_31_jon_eom_bed?refcode=em_2020_08_31_jon_eom_bed&amount=20")**

---

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, David Perdue, and the GOP are doing everything they can to stop me.

They have failed the American people in their catastrophic handling of the public health, economic, social, and environmental crises this country faces. **America needs real leadership.**

_Perdue left Washington to go home for a summer recess WITHOUT providing direct COVID-19 relief that Georgians desperately need, and Georgians have noticed._

**_Now the GOP is spending MILLIONS to try to save Perdue's floundering campaign and their hopeless Senate majority. Senator Perdue even launched an anti-Semitic attack ad against me!_**

**We deserve so much better.**

We deserve moral leadership that will build a country on the values of unity, decency, compassion, and integrity. And the only way to do that is to win.

But friend, it is going to take a big push from our grassroots supporters to beat this corruption and send Perdue and Trump into retirement.

**We are still short of our $100,000 goal with a few hours left in August.[Please, rush a donation BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to keep this campaign surging.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2b00/5b2c1286/382fbde1/25f0d705/3594282795/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_31_jon_eom_bed?refcode=em_2020_08_31_jon_eom_bed")**

Jon

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: Peter, will you be one of our final August donors?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We only get one shot at this. |
---

Peter,

It's Joe. I hope this note finds you well.

You're reading the final email I'll send you in August, and what a month it's been, Peter.

This month, Senator Kamala Harris joined me on the ticket, and I'm so proud to have her in this fight alongside me.

We held our Democratic National Convention, and re-imagined what a convention could look like in the face of a pandemic. Over 120 million Americans tuned in to watch, and I'm grateful to everyone who made the convention a roaring success.

It's true that August was a pivotal moment for this campaign. But, when we wake up tomorrow, it will be September, the biggest month of the campaign to-date. In September, I'll take the debate stage with Donald Trump, and early voting will officially get underway.

**Yes, you read that right -- early voting begins in September.** So we have to make sure we enter this next month of the campaign with every resource at our disposal to win this battle for the soul of the nation.

And we have to make sure that we start the month with an August fundraising total we can be proud of -- one that shows the strength of our full ticket with Kamala on board. It's our first public fundraising deadline as a ticket, and we only get one shot at this.

[It's critical that we reach tonight's fundraising goal, and this email is my last chance to do my part to make sure we reach it. The folks on the team say we only need to raise another $45,000 from Pennsylvania before midnight. Can I count on you to chip in $25 to help us get over the top?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B5_JRBaugfinal_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B5_JRBaugfinal_X__F1_S2_C1__full") _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Click here to express donate $25 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B5_JRBaugfinal_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B5_JRBaugfinal_X__F1_S2_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $500 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B5_JRBaugfinal_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=500&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B5_JRBaugfinal_X__F1_S2_C1__full&express_lane=true")

[Click here to donate another amount >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B5_JRBaugfinal_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B5_JRBaugfinal_X__F1_S2_C1__full")** I know that these times and this election feel different, Peter. But, it's never been more important that we stand united.

Like I've always said, there's nothing we cannot accomplish when we do it together.

**We've got 64 days to go -- we can do this, Peter. We can do this.**

---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b126/1cd0ac28/15503a53a/3570c434/3073644647/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b126/1cd0ac28/15503a53a/3570c433/3073644647/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b126/1cd0ac28/15503a53a/3570c432/3073644647/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b126/1cd0ac28/15503a53a/3570c431/3073644647/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b126/1cd0ac28/15503a53a/3570c430/3073644647/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b126/1cd0ac28/15503a53a/3570c42f/3073644647/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b126/1cd0ac28/15503a53a/3570c432/3073644647/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b126/1cd0ac28/15503a53a/3570c42d/3073644647/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Donald J. Trump

body:
Friend, I am fired up and ready to deliver a victory for South Central Pennsylvanians on Election Day.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18955442/244903852/462758527?refcode=em_ty_2020.09.01_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=6629b2d8-6bec-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjI5YjJkOC02YmVjLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5cHpXNJDbtDV8_s0Oqljg3aS4-58pc8dsKei9_6dl3E=)
**Friend -- I just got news that we surpassed our ambitious August fundraising goal!** We couldn’t have done this without the support of this grassroots team, and I am deeply grateful.

Whether you’ve given your time to call and text voters, shared your perspective through our surveys and petitions, or [**chipped in even a few dollars to help us fund our efforts**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18955443/244903853/462758527?refcode=em_ty_2020.09.01_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=6629b2d8-6bec-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjI5YjJkOC02YmVjLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5cHpXNJDbtDV8_s0Oqljg3aS4-58pc8dsKei9_6dl3E=), your support has defined the strength of this campaign.

Friend, I am fired up and ready to deliver a victory for South Central Pennsylvanians on Election Day. With just 63 days to go, I couldn’t imagine a better team to have on my side in the fight to flip this seat.

Thank you for all you do. Now, let’s get back to work and win this race!

\--Eugene

_P.S. Our last quarterly FEC fundraising deadline before the election is just a few weeks away, and it is imperative we have a strong showing on our public fundraising report.[**If you can, will you consider chipping in to help us get a head start on this important goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18955444/244903854/462758527?refcode=em_ty_2020.09.01_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=6629b2d8-6bec-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjI5YjJkOC02YmVjLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5cHpXNJDbtDV8_s0Oqljg3aS4-58pc8dsKei9_6dl3E=)_ | [Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18955445/244903855/462758527?refcode=em_ty_2020.09.01_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=6629b2d8-6bec-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjI5YjJkOC02YmVjLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5cHpXNJDbtDV8_s0Oqljg3aS4-58pc8dsKei9_6dl3E=)

name: True the Vote
subject: American needs YOU this November!
body:
September 1, 2020 is National Poll Worker Recruitment Day.
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=145A398A20A1509)

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=145A398A20A1510)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Have you ever thought about becoming a poll worker?
Now is the time to sign up and get involved. America is facing a critical shortage of these dedicated volunteers in the November election. ****Recruiting poll workers is a challenge for many election officials across the country and the COVID-19 pandemic has made this need even more critical.****

The best way to ensure free, fair, and accessible elections is more citizen engagement at the polls and in the democratic process. That's why True the Vote has teamed up with the U.S. Election Assistance Commission on [National Poll Worker Recruitment Day](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=145A398A20A1524) to raise awareness about the benefits and importance of poll working and inspire more Americans to volunteer in the November election.

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=145A398A20A1524)
---
| | ********
Why is the need so critical now?

Despite many states expanding access to an unsecure vote-by-mail option, millions of Americans – especially voters with disabilities and those who lack reliable mail service – will continue to rely on in-person voting to cast a ballot.

**Most poll workers have traditionally been over the age of 61, making them especially vulnerable to complications if they contract COVID-19. This has resulted in a critical need for poll workers who are willing and able to assist with the administration of in-person voting during an early voting period and on Election Day.

What does a poll worker do?

**While their specific duties and compensation vary depending on location, most jurisdictions task election workers with setting up and preparing the polling location, welcoming voters, verifying voter registrations, and issuing ballots. Poll workers also help ensure voters understand the voting process by demonstrating how to use voting equipment and explaining voting procedures. Election staff and volunteers are recruited and overseen by the local election authority, which provides information and training to poll workers in advance of Election Day.

**********More information about poll working and National Poll Worker Recruitment Day is available at[ HelpAmericaVote.gov](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=145A398A20A1526).

You can also visit [TrueTheVote.org](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=145A398A20A1510) for more resources and********** training programs to equip citizens to serve as election workers and to expose and deter election fraud. Check out the [Election Observer Basic Training](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=145A398A20A1513), [Election Integrity 101](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=145A398A20A1513), [Poll Watcher Training](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=145A398A20A1513), and [Signature Verification Training](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=145A398A20A1513).

If you are able and willing to serve, please [sign up to work the polls](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=145A398A20A1524) on Election Day and help America vote.

God bless you. God bless America.

Onward!**
**********
---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote

clean_body: September 1, 2020 is National Poll Worker Recruitment Day. | | | | | | | | Dear Friend, Have you ever thought about becoming a poll worker? Now is the time to sign up and get involved. America is facing a critical shortage of these dedicated volunteers in the November election. **Recruiting poll workers is a challenge for many election officials across the country and the COVID-19 pandemic has made this need even more critical. The best way to ensure free, fair, and accessible elections is more citizen engagement at the polls and in the democratic process. That's why True the Vote has teamed up with the U.S. Election Assistance Commission on to raise awareness about the benefits and importance of poll working and inspire more Americans to volunteer in the November election. | | | | **** Why is the need so critical now? Despite many states expanding access to an unsecure vote-by-mail option, millions of Americans – especially voters with disabilities and those who lack reliable mail service – will continue to rely on in-person voting to cast a ballot. Most poll workers have traditionally been over the age of 61, making them especially vulnerable to complications if they contract COVID-19. This has resulted in a critical need for poll workers who are willing and able to assist with the administration of in-person voting during an early voting period and on Election Day. What does a poll worker do? While their specific duties and compensation vary depending on location, most jurisdictions task election workers with setting up and preparing the polling location, welcoming voters, verifying voter registrations, and issuing ballots. Poll workers also help ensure voters understand the voting process by demonstrating how to use voting equipment and explaining voting procedures. Election staff and volunteers are recruited and overseen by the local election authority, which provides information and training to poll workers in advance of Election Day. ******More information about poll working and National Poll Worker Recruitment Day is available at. You can also visit for more resources and****** training programs to equip citizens to serve as election workers and to expose and deter election fraud. Check out the , , , and . If you are able and willing to serve, please on Election Day and help America vote. God bless you. God bless America. Onward! | | | | Catherine Engelbrecht Founder, True the Vote | | | | | Please follow us on Facebook, Twitter, YouTube, and Instagram! | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 True the Vote, All rights reserved. This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11c/1cd0ac28/155399842/3570c390/3340250914/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11c/1cd0ac28/155399842/3570c394/3340250914/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Biden Victory Fund accepts contributions of up to $721,300 from a person and $345,000 from a multicandidate committee ("PAC"). The first $2,800/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Biden for President. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $210,000/$105,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, AR, CT, DC, HI, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, OK, OR, RI, SC, TN, UT, WA, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

name: Ethan Gruber
subject: TONIGHT - Meet Judge Jennifer Brunner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
Hi Peter,

There's still time to RSVP to Betsy's event to support Supreme Court candidate, Judge Jennifer Brunner. It's going be a compelling discussion and we're looking forward to it. Details are below or e-mail me back with questions or RSVPs. Hope to see you tonight!

Sincerely,
Ethan

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Betsy Rader** <[betsy@betsyrader4ohio.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/FIi5KnXy0s4II677RAcKpJP2-uD9O6tL8-J5Xf4pQOA=/GG2O5Df_wuI5288xe7aNhAIri3oDJNsxsnClNi-bwhk=)>
Date: Sat, Aug 27, 2020
Subject: A Fair Ohio - An event for Judge Jennifer Brunner
To: Peter <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/FIi5KnXy0s4II677RAcKpJP2-uD9O6tL8-J5Xf4pQOA=/49XmoOnndIQSZSirVSsMHbHgh-suFj6qj7XMFPMWF4s=)>
| | | |
---
---
Peter, Next week, I'm hosting a free, virtual event to introduce you to **Judge Jennifer Brunner, **who formerly served as Ohio Secretary of State and is now running for the incredibly important position of Ohio Supreme Court Justice. Among many important cases that are decided by this Court, a critical issue likely to go before the Ohio Supreme Court is the way in which our congressional and state legislative districts are re-drawn in 2021. Democrats won two seats on the Ohio Supreme Court in 2018, and if we win the two seats on the ballot this year, the Court will have a majority of Democrats! **As we saw in [Virginia](https://act.myngp.com/el/FIi5KnXy0s4II677RAcKpJP2-uD9O6tL8-J5Xf4pQOA=/PtTFOONs0-2mGoDK7y1BzbfRjoeUJkR2nu86kKQxx-g=) and [Pennsylvania](https://act.myngp.com/el/FIi5KnXy0s4II677RAcKpJP2-uD9O6tL8-J5Xf4pQOA=/M5XIILA_GTa-0vUdZLd7mnpx6ja-qJafusL-679kGxg=), after the legislature re-draws the districts under our new Ohio laws, the new districts may be challenged in court. That's why electing someone as qualified and fair as Judge Brunner can change the future of democracy in Ohio.** It is a vital race and I hope you will join us on September 1st at 6 pm to learn more about it and the ways you can help. Republicans are working hard to get all of their judges elected and we have to do the same! [RSVP by clicking here and signing up](https://act.myngp.com/el/FIi5KnXy0s4II677RAcKpJP2-uD9O6tL8-J5Xf4pQOA=/wfmr5MCDEfu5Xve_J6D3hTxWKCWOuoBK909eIDshblI=), or e-mail my campaign manager Ethan ([ethan@betsyrader4ohio.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/FIi5KnXy0s4II677RAcKpJP2-uD9O6tL8-J5Xf4pQOA=/49XmoOnndIQSZSirVSsMHbHgh-suFj6qj7XMFPMWF4s=?subject=A%20Fair%20Ohio%20virtual%20event%20)). I look forward to seeing you!
* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/FIi5KnXy0s4II677RAcKpJP2-uD9O6tL8-J5Xf4pQOA=/w3dru2nU--caD-3EuxzuuwGEiTKDRlqUNjqkrny6FfU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FIi5KnXy0s4II677RAcKpJP2-uD9O6tL8-J5Xf4pQOA=/9lCQiqEPxi6FsZnhtfmGM6icHAlIMwVagIy2jhNXiNc=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FIi5KnXy0s4II677RAcKpJP2-uD9O6tL8-J5Xf4pQOA=/Ie7YfIZNbdIC8cyhxQ4Hobq3RUQwze3QWck0mhVGrGk=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FIi5KnXy0s4II677RAcKpJP2-uD9O6tL8-J5Xf4pQOA=/lFjOynlLlYSRi3Cpm12huREMm9H_NTF-8eecm-xrOcQ=)
---

name: Rob Portman
subject: FW: Are YOU in, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
Did you get my email? The President’s words from the other night as he accepted the GOP nomination were clear... We’re only going to prevent a........ Peter, Did you get my email?
The President’s words from the other night as he accepted the GOP nomination were clear...
We’re only going to prevent a complete takeover of our government by the Radical Left if we band together and fight.
That’s why I need to know that you’re committed to standing with our president and the values he and all conservatives are defending.
**[Will you add your name now?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=ef18b2f3fefd4f7880cf65810828e7a9&_e=OPi2yyhdyj3YkLb0K8EaH0ftpD7Qv6D5a1iwhAFFYKp3J7se52DIGsOMKtTs5xAF1TAYJecZap-3nrM1eNAL_tSceDRGnwVjgZ9rQXTnZl7SATAjduz3gMiQvEFWer9ZxYUJQouoSJdd-xS4BwfF-ap0AjiqPijGUjwheZ-eKOYEmEEiCRThNVsG0RUkDKQZk6Cs-b34GIxltUha9VwtPNdHbVhm3Pfd_MU5bcqabkpGqwqYzAuuF-l336oQI-YtokLdLPsxrMc0MSfKuGbW-50d6McGn_GET76lc7krqozyp2wZjveDa78j7sdN-CD4_o73wffz1QhBDlyGdU_hhg_uMkP0gp84uk94h0kJ76kYOA89pZU76qZ9bex5Odj4WSTjPi1BImpjI_3Q0aFbjHoL0CO21-Bn9D4B1qRUzKzJ1DKY8fGQJjRbcAl1XR8R)** [**STOP THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=ef18b2f3fefd4f7880cf65810828e7a9&_e=OPi2yyhdyj3YkLb0K8EaH0ftpD7Qv6D5a1iwhAFFYKp3J7se52DIGsOMKtTs5xAF1TAYJecZap-3nrM1eNAL_tSceDRGnwVjgZ9rQXTnZl7SATAjduz3gMiQvEFWer9ZxYUJQouoSJdd-xS4BwfF-ap0AjiqPijGUjwheZ-eKOYEmEEiCRThNVsG0RUkDKQZk6Cs-b34GIxltUha9VwtPPz_3y_AyLm7HwfoKXSLP-Oy02R82scMp5VDhQ6r0vyf4o8CbR_iQ66heW_U9EfhkyXo-npUrv9CrsGOUUUPG5eERsGwLIrB-Kp5u7hCaV6vL2X3rM0kfC0N92GDbazb90elxGQA11Qluy_RSPlpW_nVTTrJLQPXbpxfCbZQdzcJRoFlZ5HsOR_QE9sbac_NV5sbVencIu0Srrp7u19xlG2y4xtz3UnZBHLwCAmAnDZP) During the DNC, the Far-Left and Radical Democrats proved just how dangerous they are.
Former President Barack Obama even said that Joe Biden is in step with Bernie Sanders when it comes to values!
Peter -- that’s:

❌Medicare for All ❌The Green New Deal ❌Skyrocketing Taxes
If we let the Senate flip blue and hand Joe Biden the presidency, I fear that our nation could quickly be subject to these liberal policies... and worse.

name: Margaret Good
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18959520/244976658/-940294256?refcode=090120-es-thank-you&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjYxYzhmNy04M2VjLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQcI0nTIPtDWcFXSBTvTBCmYVaBfHMMVCdY2tLN-eys=&emci=7465b4f1-b8eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=b661c8f7-83ec-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=9814644)

Thank you, thank you, thank you. We reached our August fundraising goal thanks to trusted supporters like you who have invested in our campaign. It’s not only an investment in flipping this seat from red to blue; it’s an investment in our future.
Friend,

Thank you, thank you, thank you. We reached our August fundraising goal thanks to trusted supporters like you who have invested in our campaign. It’s not only an investment in flipping this seat from red to blue; it’s an investment in our future.

Together, we can bring real, positive change to Florida and our nation and deliver accountability to Washington. And it will all be thanks to supporters like you who have made a critical investment in our campaign.

**Our campaign has received a donation from every state in the country, because this race is bigger than just what’s at stake here on the Suncoast. Our race has national implications.**

If we turn out enough voters in this pivotal congressional district and win this seat, not only can we protect control of the House, we can turn Florida blue, and defeat Donald Trump here in the most important battleground state in the country.

We are at a crossroads and we need a representative that truly represents the people — and that’s exactly what I will do.

Thank you for believing in me and our campaign to put the people first.

— Margaret

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18959522/244976660/1073285021?refcode2=b661c8f7-83ec-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emci=7465b4f1-b8eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=b661c8f7-83ec-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&refcode=090120-es-thank-you&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjYxYzhmNy04M2VjLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQcI0nTIPtDWcFXSBTvTBCmYVaBfHMMVCdY2tLN-eys=)

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
---
Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18959523/244976661/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjYxYzhmNy04M2VjLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQcI0nTIPtDWcFXSBTvTBCmYVaBfHMMVCdY2tLN-eys=)**

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Sign up to be a poll worker!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ab/34a064cc/1bc91554/702dca2/940221213/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend- With the general election fast approaching, we wanted to share how you can help ensure your community is prepared. Today is National Poll Worker Recruitment Day. Signing up to be a poll worker is crucial to helping guarantee every voice is heard and every vote is counted. _[Sign up with Power the Polls and Fair Fight Action to be a poll worker today and commit to helping staff the polls in your area for early vote, Election Day, and vote by mail. Signing up helps to create an election that is safe, fair, and efficient for voters in your community. ](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ab/34a064cc/1bc91554/702dca3/940221213/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.powerthepolls.org/fairfight")_ Amid COVID-19, signing up to be a poll worker is more important than ever. Your efforts will ensure precincts can stay open for voters who need to cast their ballot in person. Poll workers will receive training and in most cases, PPE and payment for their work. Watch and share the videos below to learn more about why signing up as a poll worker is critical for elections administration in your community and across the country:
* _[Facebook](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ab/34a064cc/1bc91554/702dca0/940221213/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=637699340077347&extid=Xpx8JtuDYqcyqi1u") _
* _[Twitter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ab/34a064cc/1bc91554/702dca1/940221213/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams/status/1300797772174635018?s=20")_
* _[Instagram](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ab/34a064cc/1bc91554/702dcae/940221213/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/p/CEmM0ptBGao/")_

Thank you in advance for stepping up to help assist voters in your community. This is the most important election of our lifetime, and it will require all hands on deck -- so let's get it done. In solidarity, Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ab/34a064cc/1bc91554/702dcaf/940221213/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ab/34a064cc/1bc91554/702dcac/940221213/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4ab/34a064cc/1bc91554/702dcad/940221213/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

body:
Friday the 4th-Sunday the 6th we are demanding action--will you join us? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ad34b0d7e529/dani-needs-your-help-for-our-weekend-of-action-3911526?e=140a9b81e7)
---

---
| | We have some big news: **Our Weekend of Action event starts this Friday the 4th!** We're thrilled to be getting on the phones and talking to voters about why we need Dani Brzozowski as our next representative-- it's so important that we keep up the energy and enthusiasm as we head into the final stretch of the campaign. Our campaign will be hosting virtual phone banks to turn out voters from now until November. This means that no matter where you live,**** you can help get Dani elected to Congress without leaving your couch. **_We need to hit our goal of 50 people _**signing up for shifts this weekend in order to be on track for this month. We're counting on you to help change the course of IL-16th with your voice during our Weekend of Action. Sign up for your shifts by clicking the button below, and we look forward to working with you! ×

name: =?utf-8?Q?Austin=20Harris?=
subject: Our new TV ad is live!
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

Thanks to all of your generous donations, we have just launched another district wide TV ad! [Click here to watch it.](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=059795f9d5&e=16fac31a0f)

This new ad is a powerful reminder of the stark contrast between Senator Miller-Meeks’ take-charge approach to protect Iowans and her opponent’s passivity and partisanship.

As director of the Iowa Department of Public Health, Senator Miller-Meeks led the effort to prepare for potential pandemics. In 2013, [in an interview with WHO-TV,](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=7e5e7c6c1f&e=16fac31a0f) she warned Iowans about the threat of foreign viruses. Rita Hart goes along with what her party leadership wants. That approach puts Iowans at risk and there’s no reason to believe she’ll be any different if it comes to taking orders from Nancy Pelosi. Voters deserve to know that her ill-advised vote and her legacy as a state senator left Iowans vulnerable to foreign viruses.

We are about two months out from the election and we'd like to stay on the air. Will you donate $25 to help us run more ads like this?

[Click here to donate $25, $100 or even $10](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=a4ed850a7e&e=16fac31a0f)

Thank you for your support!

Austin Harris
Campaign Manager
---

name: Megan West
subject: Our new shirts are here!
body:
| | Peter, Start a conversation with our exclusive new t-shirts while supporting our movement to equip and motivate Christians to vote! name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: National Poll Worker Recruitment Day. Protect Our Elections!
body:
| |
---
**Today is National Poll Worker Recruitment Day!**

If you haven’t heard yet, America has a dangerous shortage of poll workers this year. We know that election integrity is one of the most important parts of a functioning republic. Unfortunately, the age group that is most vulnerable to COVID is also the group of people that usually make up the bulk of poll workers.

We also know that the left, more than anything, wants universal mail-in voting, no protections against voter fraud, and more. They want any excuse to corrupt our elections, and so, it is up to patriots like you to step up and serve as poll workers, if you are someone who is low-risk and can show up in person.

[We’ve created a very short how-to guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ1LTYxMGI1N2VlNGIxNjRhMzI4YmVlOTUyMDlmMWJiMTJj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1BvbGxXb3JrZXJfSG93X1RvX0d1aWRlLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI2MDUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=x9n4HDqOL5CRubQNw5KiTg) about how to become a poll worker. It will answer questions you may have about what a poll worker does, how to get the process started, and where to sign up.
[DOWNLOAD GUIDE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ1LTYxMGI1N2VlNGIxNjRhMzI4YmVlOTUyMDlmMWJiMTJj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1BvbGxXb3JrZXJfSG93X1RvX0d1aWRlLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI2MDUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=nyU_3wtpoHacduLXGJiRTw)
You can also go straight to www.eac.gov/help-america-vote and input your state and county information to sign up.

**And, please don’t wait to sign up! There are deadlines that must be met, and if you delay, you might miss your chance.**

Please also forward this email to anyone you think would want to serve our country and would make a good poll worker!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ1LTYxMGI1N2VlNGIxNjRhMzI4YmVlOTUyMDlmMWJiMTJj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDI2MDUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=1bCQU3amOOw78TxtFFn3vw)
|

name: Sri
subject: grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

Thank you.

I am honored to fight alongside you as we work to flip our district blue and bring real leadership to Texas families -- and I am thankful that, with your support, we’ve managed to hit our August fundraising goal.

I’m also emailing with some exciting news: CNN has placed our race on their list of the most flippable seats in this election. Our hard work is being recognized nationally -- and friend, I need you to keep up the momentum by chipping in $5 or whatever you can now.

Chip in now >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.01_b1_s_all&amount=5

I’m running for Congress because it’s time we have a representative that puts Texas families first. We’re at a time when our politics is more divisive than ever, and our own race proves it: I’m running against a fired police officer who has run a hate-filled campaign and repeatedly denied or downplayed the existence of the pandemic we face, even as his own employees got sick.

I know what we’re up against, friend. Between him and the millions of dollars in outside spending trying to uplift him, our race is difficult -- and there’s a lot at stake in this fight.

From expanding access to health care to ensuring that our road to economic recovery is centered around working families, we must ensure that our next Representative will fight for TX-22 and not corporate special interests.

And I am grateful to have you in the fight to bring that change to Congress.

Thank you,
Sri

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.01_b1_s_all&amount=25
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/
Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ce3617d1-82ec-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/7f48face-8bec-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjQ4ZmFjZS04YmVjLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnHY1OOa6n6sgQ6g1NdT9sxppCBeEfHu7n8q7qkM41U=&id=117373579 .

subject: Governor Gina M. Raimondo's Public Schedule
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---

|
| | Team,

First of all, **thank you**! I am continually blown away by the amazing work of this team and the support that each and every one of you has shown me during this campaign. Thanks to you, we broke our record and ended August on the right foot!

August was an exciting month for us and I loved getting to meet so many of you during my Farmer’s Market Tour! Seeing you all reminds me why I entered this race and why it is **critical** we win in November.

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z8k2Zat4Du3G6-DhBPIzlWNsBQMuHZVsRuZXY8D_In9t8l-gDaagHst2hbYCwRuNkTLduBF1W7wnet_w0kTgpCpi90Zz8JEvt4h4r86mkYBZ3HXUrayyjiDgFIT2pgYu0-I0hysdcdahjKgRMWeNKfG0HsYu4FH0PiXP8ZBG4f0vnbdcwJSWpa8v-NT3CcN5XW7UPejZiFV6ISD6YyWcbqCM-NsVxZq4Fdrk_SgQ_5Sr74wqQY-iHzahb5sIFh4fARYF3No5qfq9avjtvi6GNlsnfs314Q0sfmMvQvFTogjF6-RcFK9NOCLBzBg_Y11lQ/34t/31CY2jsQTWO0sIks6rbzVQ/h0/o-vNjTH9zzALNACDE1PT2ceZBxHLe61yiZ9ZtvVQ9T0)

As we get closer and closer to Election Day, I want to emphasize how important you are to this campaign. **Your voice matters, your vote matters.** I appreciate the time you have taken to join me in this endeavor – and this is just the beginning.

Together, I _know_ we can win.

Thank you for everything you do,

Gretchen

subject: Sen. Tom Cotton: Kenosha, Minneapolis Carnage Will Spread Until Politicians Restore Order, Deter Criminals
body:
Another American city is smoldering because weak politicians failed in their most basic duty: protecting the lives and property of their citizens | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a003d4b2a0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Sen. Tom Cotton: Kenosha, Minneapolis Carnage Will Spread Until Politicians Restore Order, Deter Criminals**

“Another American city is smoldering because weak politicians failed in their most basic duty: protecting the lives and property of their citizens,” Sen. Tom Cotton writes for Fox News.

“Months into this crisis, the lesson to any responsible leader is clear: take action quickly to maintain order, otherwise anarchists and insurrections will be emboldened to destroy your city and move on to the next one. Last week, Kenosha and Minneapolis were the unlucky cities. Next week, it could be your home town.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ff167311e1&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:**[**Acting DHS Secretary Wolf responds to Portland Mayor’s letter**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5dd9596350&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Protests have spread across the United States for months now, along with calls for defunding local police departments. But the movement to defund police has a crucial flaw: the policy that it seeks would harm the minority communities whom the protesters claim to care about. Moreover, those communities don’t even agree with it,” Urban Reform Institute President Charles Blain writes in [_City Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e0da2116ee&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The Department of Agriculture announced Monday that it is extending and expanding a critical food assistance program that has been providing free meals to millions of children during the coronavirus pandemic . . . In addition to extending the assistance through December 31, [USDA is] also expanding access to it,” Devan Cole reports for [CNN](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5d4461b1a6&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “As President Trump has said, in honor of ‘the millions of Jews who suffered unthinkable persecution, we renew our pledge now and always: Never again.’ President Trump has made good on that pledge by fighting anti-Semitism at home and abroad and by standing shoulder to shoulder with Israel, the historical homeland and refuge for the Jewish people,” National Security Advisor Robert O’Brien writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1a7a3aff98&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

When is Joe Biden going to criticize the Anarchists, Thugs, and Agitators in ANTIFA?

The answer is NEVER. Joe Biden is cowering down to his radical base, and THIS is what we have to fear if the Left takes back the White House.

It is crucial that we give President Trump the resources to WIN in November. The future of our Nation is a stake, and it’s going to take EVERY Patriot coming together if we’re going to succeed.

name: Team Evergreen
subject: This hurricane season, call for an end to the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Another hurricane season, more tragic anniversaries.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=2607%2E53494%2EuGl9eC) Friend, Hurricane season is a tragic reminder of the devastating power of a climate in crisis. It was this time 15 years ago that Hurricane Katrina ravaged the Gulf Coast, taking the lives of more than 1,800 people in Louisiana and states as far north as Ohio. And three years ago, Hurricanes Harvey, Irma, and Maria devastated the Caribbean and the Gulf Coast. These storms and countless others have left millions of people without homes, creating climate refugees within our own borders. Of course, layered on top of a pandemic, natural disasters like hurricanes become even more dangerous, as the destruction from last week's Hurricane Laura has made clear. **[Without action, extreme weather events fueled by climate change could become the norm. Add your name to show your support for an all-out mobilization to defeat the climate crisis.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/771?t=3&akid=2607%2E53494%2EuGl9eC)** When we reflect on these disasters -- not to mention the wildfires that have burned more than a million acres in California in the last month -- it's hard not to appreciate the urgent need for climate action. The story of the 21st century is one in which lives, homes, and communities are on the line at this time of year _every year_ \-- and will be until we commit, as a country, to bold climate action. **[Now is the time for action. We're putting pressure on Democrats to use their power to push for an all-out mobilization to defeat the climate crisis. Sign on today to show your support.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/771?t=4&akid=2607%2E53494%2EuGl9eC)** Sincerely, Team Evergreen | [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/771?t=5&akid=2607%2E53494%2EuGl9eC)
---

name: True the Vote
subject: NEW Podcast: Time To PARTY! It's National Poll Worker Recruitment Day!
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=148A402A20A1547)
---
| | |
---
| | This week on Red, White & True... It's National Poll Worker Recruitment Day and We're Celebrating Election Integrity!
---
| | Today is National Poll Worker Recruitment Day! In our latest episode of the [Red, White, and True podcast](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=148A402A20A1557), we take closer look at what citizen engagement in our election process actually looks like. Since True the Vote was launched, we've always had a deep-seated passion for individuals getting involved and working in the polls on election day. Catherine shares her own personal story from volunteering at the polls and what really goes into a poll worker's job.

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=148A402A20A1558)
---
| | The best way to ensure free, fair, and accessible elections is more citizen engagement at the polls and in the democratic process. But right now, America is facing a critical shortage of dedicated volunteers in the November election. If you are able and willing to serve, please [sign up to work the polls](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=148A402A20A1559) on Election Day and help America vote.

More information about how you can serve at the polls and National Poll Worker Recruitment Day is available at [HelpAmericaVote.gov](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=148A402A20A1560).
You can also visit [TrueTheVote.org](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=148A402A20A1561) to enroll in or learn more about training programs that equip citizens to serve as election workers and help expose and deter election fraud. Check out the Election Observer Basic Training, Election Integrity 101, Poll Watcher Training, and Signature Verification Training.
**Click below to listen or[ watch a video of the podcast](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=148A402A20A1558) on our YouTube page. **
---

---

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Cut off benefits for rioters?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
I’ve partnered with my friend Representative Jim Banks of Indiana to make these rioters pay a price. Under our proposal, anyone who is convicted of rioting will immediately lose their federal unemployment benefits. That way, even if the liberal prosecutors let the Antifa anarchists off the hook, we can cut off their money. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNDkzODQS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDA3MzIwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

Are you sick of watching the liberal mob cause destruction in New York, Chicago, Portland, Washington D.C., and Kenosha?
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNDkzODQS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDA3MzIwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0
I am.

But here’s the problem: thanks to liberal officials, Antifa anarchists burn down buildings, assault police officers, and cause chaos and they keep getting away with it. Police arrest the rioters, but the liberal prosecutors let them out of jail and back on the streets to cause more destruction.

Enough is enough.

I’ve partnered with my friend Representative Jim Banks of Indiana to make these rioters pay a price. Under our proposal, anyone who is convicted of rioting will immediately lose their federal unemployment benefits. That way, even if the liberal prosecutors let the Antifa anarchists off the hook, we can cut off their money.
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNDkzODQS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDA3MzIwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0
Why should taxpayers pay for Antifa anarchists to sit in their basements all day and cause destruction at night?

I want to know if you agree with me:
Should we cut off unemployment benefits to anyone convicted of rioting? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNDkzODQS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDA3MzIwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0 http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNDkzODQS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDA3MzIwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0
If you agree, please sign my petition. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNDkzODQS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDA3MzIwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0

If we can get enough support, we’ve got a good chance to finally make these rioters pay. Until there are consequences for this violence, it will continue. That’s why I’m fighting back.

In service,Tom Cotton http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMzNDkzODQS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MDA3MzIwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: K-12 testing
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
From the earliest days of this pandemic, Rhode Island has led the nation in testing. We've run more tests per capita than any other state in the country and substantially more than our neighbors. There's no question that our aggressive testing strategy has been critical to our success in keeping a lid on this virus. Building on that success will be crucial in safely reopening schools for in-person learning. To ensure rapid, effective testing for our school communities, we are creating a dedicated testing structure for K-12 students and staff at both public and private schools. Through this system, we'll have the daily capacity to run 4,000 PCR or diagnostic tests with 48-hour results and 1,200 rapid tests with same-day results. Here's how it will work.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HHQtYsEbQx13r9OOGz46n7pkJtfZSffxciwFmzqGQkfhqV3Io6Cge9qrB77Qvkt71gtOXpVbPkMPSZB8-RD_GcYgIMsRI8ZdD-s0d4pQFojzCK3-5t4RslhsRRCzWtE1xy1zLJv_xXueJXnexPyEYWPrL9rc7rpaFPwEP9JUcFvwZV0YCqwVpJKbEQx1SsMyaVrLyKQAdkg=&c=Ua5jUbGiPpsYY6_7Sj3JUzax3Za1LM1nko4xE2I0v_x7sSDY6lvNRg==&ch=8XWLnauK4QLd9Yjlifl-OoUqeCzljJ4un_m1tKPfzVUKihayUeoUlA==)
---
| If a student or staff member wakes up with symptoms, they'll need to stay home and schedule a COVID test. You can do that by calling our dedicated K-12 testing hotline. When you call the hotline, you'll get an appointment at one of our K-12 swabbing sites. We'll announce the number for that hotline when we get closer to the first day of school. When you get to the testing site, we're going to run two types of tests: a PCR test and a rapid test. The PCR or diagnostic test is more sensitive, but it takes a little longer to get your results. On the flip side, the rapid tests have helped us immediately identify thousands of positives since the start of this pandemic, but it's a little less sensitive. This dual approach will give us both same-day results that our contact tracers can use to immediately take action and a more sensitive test to confirm the accuracy of those results. While you wait for your results, you need to stay home. If your test is negative, you can return to school after your symptoms have improved, as long as you're fever-free for 24 hours. If your test is positive, you'll need to follow CDC guidance before coming back to school--you'll need to be fever-free for 24 hours with improving symptoms and it needs to be 10 days after symptoms first appeared. If you're asymptomatic, you need to isolate for 10 days after your swab was performed. We're also preparing for the reality that students or staff will develop symptoms while in the school building. If anyone feels sick in school, they'll immediately go to their school's dedicated isolation room until they can leave the building. Once at home, the process is the same--you'll call the hotline and schedule your swab. You'll get your rapid test result the same day, and the PCR result within 48 hours. As an additional precaution, we're going to test certain asymptomatic populations through our K-12 hotline. If you're a close contact of someone we know has COVID-19, you'll also get tested at one of our K-12 swab sites.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HHQtYsEbQx13r9OOGz46n7pkJtfZSffxciwFmzqGQkfhqV3Io6Cge8W3OuDLqTgpJVg_E7VkbPbjtrLdTZWwFB2IFrkd8VltVv8BpMbaGdr_SAVlFIoA0IvCUy3lWOx_CmbQEv6Uxbi7FJnMXKyGquiErt0EGuum852PsxqoR5hnvGpbN4Cvvr_HdhrSEkfexHM3yS0MakU=&c=Ua5jUbGiPpsYY6_7Sj3JUzax3Za1LM1nko4xE2I0v_x7sSDY6lvNRg==&ch=8XWLnauK4QLd9Yjlifl-OoUqeCzljJ4un_m1tKPfzVUKihayUeoUlA==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HHQtYsEbQx13r9OOGz46n7pkJtfZSffxciwFmzqGQkfhqV3Io6Cge8W3OuDLqTgpJVg_E7VkbPbjtrLdTZWwFB2IFrkd8VltVv8BpMbaGdr_SAVlFIoA0IvCUy3lWOx_CmbQEv6Uxbi7FJnMXKyGquiErt0EGuum852PsxqoR5hnvGpbN4Cvvr_HdhrSEkfexHM3yS0MakU=&c=Ua5jUbGiPpsYY6_7Sj3JUzax3Za1LM1nko4xE2I0v_x7sSDY6lvNRg==&ch=8XWLnauK4QLd9Yjlifl-OoUqeCzljJ4un_m1tKPfzVUKihayUeoUlA==).
---
| As a reminder, I'm holding press conferences every day this week at 1 p.m. to give an update on our school reopening plans. Tomorrow, I'm going to talk in more detail about what happens if you test positive and how we're going to use rapid contact tracing and case investigation to prevent outbreaks.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=b8fe6592-862f-46a9-9fa2-41a66166def6)
---

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Missed our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I'm writing with an update, everyone: We didn't raise enough to hit our match fundraising goal yesterday.
With the race for Senate control the most important race happening in our country right now -- and FiveThirtyEight saying we have to win in New Hampshire to have any hope of taking back the Senate for Democrats -- **missing this match goal puts our chances of winning in serious danger.**
**So, this morning our generous donors came back and extended the match opportunity to 11:59 P.M. tonight -- we have one last shot to turn this around.**
It's more important than ever that we hit this $60,000 goal by midnight. But we only have a few hours left before this amazing match is over -- and with Senate control on the line, I'm counting on your contribution:

name: Jay Inslee
subject: I'm floored, honestly
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8136%2E868730%2ELjuGZ2) I've got to be honest with you, friend, I'm always floored by the grassroots support this campaign receives when we need it most. We set a huge goal, but we met it, bit by bit and small donation by small donation. And isn't that how we win all our big fights? None of us can make big change alone. We all have to be invested in the work ahead, in the progress we know we deserve. Your donations are that investment. And while our opponent has big-money support from the Republican Governors Association, we have grassroots support from folks just like you. **I know who I'd pick in my corner every day: You. Thank you for joining the fight.** Together, we'll win in November and then win the big fights yet to come. name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: I'm blown away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Thank you for everything you did to support this campaign in August. |
---

Peter,

I'm blown away by all that this team accomplished in August.

From welcoming Kamala Harris to our team as my running mate, to holding four nights of our unifying, inspiring convention, to our end-of-month fundraising push -- it means so much to know that you were with me every step of the way.

Peter, thank you for everything you did to support this campaign in August. Supporters like you are the reason why I'm more confident than ever that we will win this fight, and I'm grateful to you from the bottom of my heart.

The outcome of this election will come down to the work we do over the next two months -- and when the polls close on November 3rd, we must be able to say we did everything we could to win.

[So, Peter, we've got to keep pushing to make every day count. If you're able to pitch in and own a piece of this campaign today, will you make a contribution of $25 or more to fuel Kamala and I to victory over Donald Trump? Folks who make their first donation through this email have an extra chance to end up on my grassroots call list, so I may be giving you a call to thank you myself:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.01_B2_jrb-ty_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.01_B2_jrb-ty_X__F1_S1_C1__nd") _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Kara Eastman
subject: please read this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eastman for Congress
body:
|
---

| | [**_Peter, Election Day is just 63 days away. I have one of the best shots in the country to unseat a GOP Congressman. But I need to raise $8,290 by midnight, to keep my campaign firing on all cylinders. So I 'm asking you to rush $5 to close the gap >>_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e83c/77d4c309/21976162/2635e8a7/3493257286/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200901_em_fr_b1_kara_all_rs&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") **I 'm running because I've seen far too many people suffer at the hands of the GOP.**

**People like my Mom.** She battled cancer _five times_. While her medical bills piled up, Congressman Don Bacon voted to dismantle the Affordable Care Act.

She died in 2017, after being homebound for a year because she could not afford $2,500 for a _single_ pill. | [](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e83c/77d4c309/21976162/2635e8a7/3493257286/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200901_em_fr_b1_kara_all_rs&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
_Kara and her mother._
---
**People like my daughter, Sabina.** She makes me proud to be her mom every single day, and she deserves to live in a country where hard work is rewarded and she can get ahead.

One without gun violence, soaring student loan debt, and inaction towards climate change.

**People like my Field Director, Fatima.** She's a DREAMer and Omaha is the only home she's ever known.

Still, the GOP treats her and many other immigrants like political pawns, leaving Trump's handpicked judges to decide their fate.
[**Please Peter, I need $8,290 to defeat Don Bacon for my loved ones and yours. Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e83c/77d4c309/21976162/2635e8af/3493257286/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e83c/77d4c309/21976162/2635e8ae/3493257286/VEsHAw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e83c/77d4c309/21976162/2635e8a9/3493257286/VEsHAg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

name: Sandy Smith
subject: They want America to be Like Portland
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g6peGusRw3Nxmng&b=Ls0tJoP5TM7mczb0iMv.RQ)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am tired of the Biden riots and the violence caused by the Democrats' overheated rhetoric attacking anyone they disagree with!**

Did you catch the Republican Convention last week? It was fantastic- a real week-long celebration of being an American.
As this was happening, the Democrats were conducting violent riots in Portland and Kenosha, completely without consequence from local liberal Mayors who have allowed the destruction and murder.
On Thursday, they brought that destruction and rioting and violence to Washington, another city with a crazy liberal mayor. And the rioters took advantage of it by attacking peaceful Republicans coming out of the White House.
_**One of these was Senator Rand Paul, who gave his account of the assault later:**_
_In his speech to the Republican National Convention Thursday night, President Trump said if you want the rest of the country to look like Portland, Ore., put the Democrats fully in charge and that’s what you’ll get._
_That’s hard to argue with considering what we are seeing in many of our cities, where well-intentioned protest marches long ago were hijacked into lawless and violent destructive anarchy, often led by outside agitators and violent Marxists._
_I experienced some of this in Washington after the president’s speech.

My wife Kelley and I were attempting to leave the White House event. We were staying at a hotel directly across the street, maybe 50 yards from the gates of the White House. But as we went to leave, it became apparent there was no safe exit out the gates and through the unruly mob that had gathered there._
_Why? Because another Democratic-run city had decided it would bow to lawless rioters instead of protecting its citizens. Mayor Muriel Bowser was asked by the Secret Service to allow wider and better protection for those leaving the White House Thursday night, but she refused._

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g6peGusRw3Nxmng&b=Ls0tJoP5TM7mczb0iMv.RQ)
---

_For the record, Senator Paul has now been attacked three times by crazed liberals, one of which required several surgeries and the removal of part of his lung._

**He has suffered much for doing the right thing, including the "Justice for Breanna Taylor" Act. The crowd, ignorant of this, was actually demanding for Rand to say her name- or else they would harm him.**

**_This is Joe Biden's America. These people aren't Republicans. These rioters HATE Republicans- just like Biden, Pelosi, Butterfield and all the Democrats do. _**

You cannot govern a nation you hate, and yet, that's what Biden's Democrats are trying to do.

_THAT is why we must win. THAT is why we need to push hard here!_

**If we do not defeat the Democrats this year, all of us- freedom-loving Americans and conservatives- will be cancelled. Persecuted. **

[If you agree with me, I need your help to beat Pelosi's deputy whip Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g6peGusRw3Nxmng&b=Ls0tJoP5TM7mczb0iMv.RQ) Unlike Pelosi, unlike Butterfield, I will love America and help Americans!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g6peGusRw3Nxmng&b=Ls0tJoP5TM7mczb0iMv.RQ), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is awful, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g6peGusRw3Nxmng&b=Ls0tJoP5TM7mczb0iMv.RQ). Our country needs us NOW! Let's stand up now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g6peGusRw3Nxmng&b=Ls0tJoP5TM7mczb0iMv.RQ)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g6peGusRw3Nxmng&b=Ls0tJoP5TM7mczb0iMv.RQ)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g6peGusRw3Nxmng&b=Ls0tJoP5TM7mczb0iMv.RQ) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsLAysHAyc) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsLAysHAyc)
