name: Bill Olson
subject: A 17-Year-Old Showed us the 2nd Amendment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I am the Republican who will flip this swing district because people here want law and order and are tired of the Biden Riots! I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left extremist Socialism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA

The Biden Riots have been horrific all year long. I cannot believe that the liberal Democrat mayors of this country have not restored law and order by attesting the violent, in some cases murderous, Antifa rioters!

What happened in Kenosha, Wisconsin is the best example of why we NEED the Second Amendment, and why we must fight this year to protect it.

Kyle Rittenhouse, a young man who works in Kenosha, decided to clean up the graffiti left by the rioters the previous night. He stuck around to offer medical help to the injured rioters (!) and protect the businesses from more destruction and looting.

Just like with Sandmann, the media, especially CNN and the Washington Post, immediately attacked this kid. They attacked him because he did not allow a crazed, violent mob to kill him.

In a word, these violent rioters were trying to kill this kid- to cancel him, FOR NO GOOD REASON.

In a statement late Friday, Rittenhouse's attorneys said he was defending himself from a "mob" of attackers who "accosted" and "verbally threatened and taunted" him while he was guarding a mechanic’s shop on Sheridan Road with a group of armed men and he was legally justified in firing the weapon.

Rittenhouse was being chased when he heard a gunshot behind him, the release said. He said he turned and was faced with "an attacker lunging towards him and reaching for his rifle."

According to the criminal complaint, 26-year-old Joseph Rosenbaum, who was unarmed, was fatally shot by Rittenhouse.

The release goes on to describe "a growing mob" that chased Rittenhouse down the street until he fell down. The people chasing him "kicked" him and "bashed him over the head with a skateboard."

The criminal complaint describes that a crowd followed Rittenhouse, with people shouting "get him!" and saying he had just shot someone. Several people tried to disarm Rittenhouse, including 26-year-old Anthony Huber, who was holding a skateboard in his right hand and reached for the teen's gun with his other hand.

Given attacks by this crazed mob, it's a good thing this kid was armed. If I were him, I would be armed too- and I would have put these violent attackers into the ground also.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA

The Fake News media is making this kid out to be a bloodthirsty white supremacist, but there's no evidence of that at all! They just don't like a good American kid utilizing his Second Amendment rights to defend himself against violent extremists who would have attacked him and killed him otherwise.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA

The media are dedicated to the complete destruction of America, and they are equally devoted to the destruction of our freedoms. They hate our Second Amendment and they want to slime this kid because of it.

Here's the good news: The American people see the media for what it is!

These Antifa extremists and their far-Left allies in the media and the Democrat party only win if we let them! That's why we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA

I'm an unapologetic patriot, and I am a Constitutionalist. I believe in our Second Amendment and I will fight to defend it!

This very week, Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". She is actively promoting these "Biden Riots" and all their political violence against conservatives. We cannot let these people win again this year, or they will cancel us. It is that simple.

But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I am a patriot and I need your help to counter the media's lies!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA

I am calling all Trump patriots to help me to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA
This is a swing district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmm2H6ZF1F6OuRU&b=mL1RucAb5TuNW0TYccNwwA
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

**New Hampshire’s primary election is just ONE WEEK AWAY!**

☐ _Have a ballot?_ Mail, fax, or hand-deliver the completed ballot to your local clerk the day before Election Day.
**[Click here for more information about absentee voting or to find your local clerk’s office.>>>](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=0e3de2768b1049adae04296703c3d9d3&_e=LdAUj12KntYWOsyyHWauo8_YgKkmNfqBwLTTKbm9qtzw8DNo-xADf7xUcGkUtz3zld-Fk7JUBs1nyOMLMNRX8vAo1uyMl8hqd38fruocB9H3djiBgp1RzbHlt4VRjPBBU9veZ-3vR0mBttHJ5JCkaTclzKj_Qc9ibj3ATk69V1HLUs_-hrQ8W73SzO2O41778Dk7PEGFkOjZjrFqTPfYwL-67nCQUHoigkURKpRrxfMal1QPmaHDTm66XFHB3XFHv5Cojzsrz8a1k3w7pOOhxiwj2qr9YTLumPQJJJcIAGB7p-2zBykO7iRrleNl_KqjI_PdouHCEKG2JOYvubZVqiv2JADyqvcBim85-6iMgydJwNHEfJ0abjwtH0ZiouGbnCoC-V2FAjBGOF6cNKQhiZlX6DMT8-WU18w8DvKLXZ-jQiohlev0IjgO-8t0eLAGnPebkLWb_6t-XsmpGfi-OjqXVjzuttOqJuCTDx-AsYHe3mTABOPC_KhvZ-TNn3wu)**

**[Click here to find your polling location.>>>](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=0e3de2768b1049adae04296703c3d9d3&_e=LdAUj12KntYWOsyyHWauo8_YgKkmNfqBwLTTKbm9qtzw8DNo-xADf7xUcGkUtz3zld-Fk7JUBs1nyOMLMNRX8nIlLryos8-Rov_PmNTIOCk5GxPbdsikkEJV_OIoXW_FX37DYhHto1iAhFdAzLUTnsliIRrJVheB8JUm5tAb-BbHofNPEWJ1ehr1_373n6UNxMvTvx6xrDNJyaMR-lKVpLTVVA_snqM5hlTYgCT6EY-Aq5-sA17PjGqn6FAFq1zhR4p_NYLkzHd8COPjiOJMMsWXhP9iVPt_MWjrXC6b1pR-wcwQXXjhO4UTLuOmiiyc7CiWvOIDJ1xdAd80NR8AtEpjWkez2lyAHLzZW3KCCSap968xTn1TFjFBWv6ESyT_6C_I3ZdGKWbVmPa4HtwXCoXHYz2nrMl5pFeQnLTZAfHL0WLhLvbsJsxc_I7TqHPZ6nRkeM6BhyutforqoPfnULsQE9Vr7Yttw15PxqVMV72blwzA-vypZrSUR6MRsj79)**

subject: I have you to thank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
Since my team sent you a ton of emails over the last few days, I wanted to quickly take a moment and say THANK YOU to everyone who contributed to my re-election campaign this past week!

With your help, I'll be able to keep fighting on behalf of the working families of CA-38.

I know firsthand that change doesn't always come easy. That's why we need people in Congress who are willing to stand up and fight for policies that will actually benefit working Americans -- something I try to do every day and what I'll continue to do if re-elected.

So, once again, thank you. Your support really means the world to me.

-- Linda Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jason=20Maulucci?=
subject: FW: Phil needs our support
body:
Did you see the note from Gov. Douglas? |
---
| | Friend,
---
| I wanted to make sure you saw this message from Governor Jim Douglas.

Governor Douglas understands what it takes to serve in Vermont's top job -- and he knows that our state needs Governor Phil Scott at the helm as we navigate these uncertain times and work to emerge stronger than before.

With just three weeks before voting begins, [will you join Vermont's 80th governor to make sure Governor Scott has the resources needed to win this race?](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=897e7b4842&e=19cebfe173)

Sincerely,

Jason Maulucci
Campaign Manager
[**Phil Scott for Vermont **](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=11b42ad1d7&e=19cebfe173)

## **EMAIL FROM GOV. DOUGLAS: **
---
| | Friend,
---
| I know what it’s like to serve as Governor through tough times. Back in 2008, when the world faced its most significant financial crisis since the Great Depression, my team and I worked around the clock to respond. Today, Governor Phil Scott is managing our state through a once-in-a-century public health challenge and the economic fallout it has left in its wake. His strong leadership has helped make Vermont one of the safest states in the nation and we’re fortunate to have his steady hand on the wheel. On top of everything Phil is dealing with, we’re just a few weeks away from when Vermonters will begin casting their ballots in the General Election. Phil has been clear that his top priority is doing the job he was elected to do: leading our state -- not campaigning. But he needs our help, [so I offered to pitch in](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=10f0e141ee&e=19cebfe173).

For three years before this crisis hit, and especially since it began, Governor Scott has been the leader Vermont needs. **We simply cannot afford a change in leadership right now, and his opponent has been raising money and campaigning for months. ** **[We need to make sure Phil has the resources he needs to win this race.](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=36e848ba02&e=19cebfe173) ** Can I count on you to [chip in $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can spare to ensure Phil wins in November](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ef8744ea3d&e=19cebfe173)? He’s had our backs and now it's our turn to have his. Thank you for your consideration. On to victory in November! **Gov. Jim Douglas
80th Governor of Vermont**
---
| [Contribute](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=05dd21cdce&e=19cebfe173 "Contribute")
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=6b8ef3c003&e=19cebfe173)
---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=dcfb64bb2e&e=19cebfe173)
---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=90ea57598f&e=19cebfe173)
---
| | Phil Scott for Vermont, Glen Wright, Treasurer,
P.O. Box 988, Montpelier, VT, 05602

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173&c=268cd0c442)
---

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Thank you for your help last month, can you take a second to answer a few questions for me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Right now, at this crucial moment in the campaign, your input is more valuable than ever. |
---

Peter,

First of all, I want to thank you so much for your help in making last month such a success.

As a grassroots supporter, I know you are fully invested in this ticket and defeating Donald Trump in 63 days. I just can't thank you enough.

With August over, we're now entering the fall season of an election year. I don't have to tell you how quickly things move from here. With so little time before votes are cast, every single decision we make right now matters.

**So before we finalize our strategy for the final two months of the campaign, I want to hear from you, Peter.**

Joe and I have always relied on our grassroots supporters to help guide our decision-making, and right now, at this crucial moment in the campaign, your input is more valuable than ever.

[Please, take our brand new campaign strategy survey now and tell us what you think. It will only take a few minutes, and I personally would really appreciate your input.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d126/1334989913/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/fall-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.01_B3_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.01_B3_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d126/1334989913/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/fall-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.01_B3_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.01_B3_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
**Peter, our team is hoping to get 50,000 responses this week from grassroots supporters like you, so I hope you'll take a moment to share your thoughts.**

As you know, the final two months of this campaign will be packed with huge decisions and highly anticipated debates.

But we'll also have to decide how we'll win over swing voters in the key battleground states, and how we'll get out the vote and win this election on November 3rd.

Before we make any final decisions on how to handle these issues, I want to hear from supporters like you first, Peter. So if you have a few minutes, please take the new strategy survey today.

**Even if you've taken one of Joe's surveys before, we're a new ticket in a new phase of this election cycle. So it's important that we know what you think now, as we enter the campaign's home stretch. Here's the link where you can get started:**

[https://go.joebiden.com/Fall-Strategy-Survey](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d126/1334989913/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/fall-campaign-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.01_B3_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.01_B3_fallsurv_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Thanks so much, Peter.

Kamala Harris
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d125/1334989913/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d124/1334989913/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d123/1334989913/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d122/1334989913/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d121/1334989913/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d120/1334989913/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d11f/1334989913/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d11e/1334989913/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d11d/1334989913/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d11c/1334989913/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d11f/1334989913/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d11b/1334989913/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d11e/1334989913/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b152/1cd0ac28/156919bf5/3570d11a/1334989913/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Frankel is Frightened . . .
body:
Late last night, “Lazy” Lois Frankel, in her typical haphazard fashion, released a desperate fundraising email.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-391105-921713-5171514-1b3d279648-7324e438bc)
Patriot,

Late last night, Lazy Lois Frankel, in her typical haphazard fashion, released a desperate fundraising email.

Here’s the email along with a screenshot of the donation page:

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-391105-921713-5171514-1b3d279648-7324e438bc)
If you can get past the typos from the “professional” campaign of a Democrat incumbent, you’ll see that I’m now a “hate filled online conspiracy theorist.”

Last week, the DCCC said I had “ties to the Klu Klux Klan.”

**Talk about conspiracy theories!**

But it looks like our ads are making an impact and knocking Lois back on her heels!

So let’s give Frankel another fright!

[Pitch in $10 to help fund our ads this week.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-391105-921713-5171514-1b3d279648-7324e438bc)

By midnight tonight, we need to raise $5,000 to cover the production of TWO ads plus another $40,000 to get them rolling for the next week.

[Will you help us cover those costs?](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-391105-921713-5171514-1b3d279648-7324e438bc)

You should have already seen our other ads that are telling the truth about Lois Frankel and setting the record straight about me – **most importantly, voters are paying attention**.

Frankel has FAILED FLORIDA and the AMERICAN PEOPLE!

She’s feeling a bit nervous about her ability to keep pace with me and our hard-working campaign staff.

**And Lazy Lois knows that we’re just getting started!**

**So let’s keep going:** [Chip in $10 right now if you can.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-391105-921713-5171514-1b3d279648-7324e438bc)

Thank you again for all that you do!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

| | Derek --

We'll make this quick -- I know you've been hearing a lot from Team Warner over the last few days. We're closing the books on August fundraising, and just got the news that our generous donors are extending donation matching **until the end of the day**.

If you've been thinking about contributing to help support Mark Warner and keep him in the Senate working for _every_ Virginian, now is the time! Until midnight tonight, every gift to the campaign is being doubled. We're less than 70 days away from Election Day, and we need all the help we can get to cross the finish line.

Mark is working hard in the Senate to make sure that Virginians have the resources they need during and after the coronavirus pandemic, to keep foreign interference out of our elections, and to build an economy that works for everyone. Now, he needs our help to keep his seat so he can continue to work with Virginians to build a brighter future for everyone.

So please, if you haven't contributed to help send Mark Warner back to the Senate, consider doing so now -- **_every dollar you pitch in counts as two dollars._** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Jake Best, Ossoff Press Secretary
subject: Finishing what we started
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We started a movement in 2017. Now, it's time to finish the job. |
---
Hi friend,

I'm Jake, Jon Ossoff's Press Secretary.

**[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to join me in chipping in to Jon Ossoff's campaign for U.S. Senate](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2bf6/5b2c1286/385da187/25f0dee4/2491477535/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_01_jb?refcode=em_2020_09_01_jb")** \-- but first, I want to take you back to a moment none of us will ever forget, a reminder of why we're in this fight.

November 8, 2016. If you're like me, friend, you probably remember exactly where you were when you heard the news Donald Trump had been elected President.

_Despair. Fear. Confusion. Anxiety. Shock._ They all set in at once.

And the same question came to us all: What do we do now?

**For me, it was serving as a field organizer in the 2017 Special Election in Georgia's 6th Congressional District for a 30-year-old Democrat named Jon Ossoff.**

I first met Jon in February 2017 at his campaign's first canvass launch in my hometown of Roswell, Georgia. I grew up being told there were no other Democrats around us in our area -- the former home of Newt Gingrich and Johnny Isakson -- and that we should keep our politics to ourselves.

I even remember my family putting out an Obama yard sign ... _only for it to be taken down by a neighbor hours later!_

But as I knocked on doors that spring and summer of 2017, I would show other skeptical Democrats my map of doors to knock. One by one, they realized their neighbors voted Democratic too, and new communities were born.

**Jon's campaign taught us all the power of grassroots campaigning._In a district where the last Democrat lost by 24 points (!!!), our people-powered movement of over 13,000 volunteers ended up coming within a few points of winning just six months later._**

Yes, we came up short. But we learned from our faults and picked ourselves up to stay in the fight for the country we believe in.

Because we knew there was more work to do.

We joined the movements that Stacey Abrams, Lucy McBath, Carolyn Bourdeaux, and so many others here in Georgia built in 2018 -- movements that continue today. **And now, Georgia is poised to tip into the Democrats' column, with Jon LEADING in the polls in his race for U.S. Senate.**

**_It's why Mitch McConnell's super PAC is spending more against Jon than *any other Democratic U.S Senate candidate in the country.*_**

**[So friend, will you join me in helping Jon finish the job we all started in 2017 by chipping in to win this Senate race in Georgia?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2bf6/5b2c1286/385da187/25f0dee4/2491477535/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_01_jb?refcode=em_2020_09_01_jb")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Friend, victory in Georgia is so much more important than being able to color Georgia blue on a map.

It's about pushing to expand Medicaid and helping half a million Georgians gain insurance, and safeguarding protections for the 1.8 million Georgians like me with pre-existing conditions.

It's about putting families and small businesses at the front of the line for once.

And about rebuilding our economy with historic investments in clean energy and infrastructure.

**I can tell you from experience, friend: Jon is the real deal.**

He's in this fight because he truly cares about each and every Georgian, regardless of their political affiliation. _Because that's what he learned from his mentor, Congressman John Lewis: that we are all brothers and sisters._

**And with history on our doorstep here in Georgia, we need your help more than ever. Jon is under attack like never before; Mitch McConnell and Jon's opponent David Perdue will stoop low to try to stop us.**

**[Now, it's up to us to finish the job we started. Chip in $20 right now to help carry us to victory in November>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2bf6/5b2c1286/385da187/25f0deef/2491477535/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_01_jb?refcode=em_2020_09_01_jb&amount=20")**

clean_body: We started a movement in 2017. Now, it's time to finish the job. | Hi friend, I'm Jake, Jon Ossoff's Press Secretary. "" \-- but first, I want to take you back to a moment none of us will ever forget, a reminder of why we're in this fight. November 8, 2016. If you're like me, friend, you probably remember exactly where you were when you heard the news Donald Trump had been elected President. Despair. Fear. Confusion. Anxiety. Shock. They all set in at once. And the same question came to us all: What do we do now? For me, it was serving as a field organizer in the 2017 Special Election in Georgia's 6th Congressional District for a 30-year-old Democrat named Jon Ossoff. I first met Jon in February 2017 at his campaign's first canvass launch in my hometown of Roswell, Georgia. I grew up being told there were no other Democrats around us in our area -- the former home of Newt Gingrich and Johnny Isakson -- and that we should keep our politics to ourselves. I even remember my family putting out an Obama yard sign ... only for it to be taken down by a neighbor hours later! But as I knocked on doors that spring and summer of 2017, I would show other skeptical Democrats my map of doors to knock. One by one, they realized their neighbors voted Democratic too, and new communities were born. Jon's campaign taught us all the power of grassroots campaigning.In a district where the last Democrat lost by 24 points (!!!), our people-powered movement of over 13,000 volunteers ended up coming within a few points of winning just six months later. Yes, we came up short. But we learned from our faults and picked ourselves up to stay in the fight for the country we believe in. Because we knew there was more work to do. We joined the movements that Stacey Abrams, Lucy McBath, Carolyn Bourdeaux, and so many others here in Georgia built in 2018 -- movements that continue today. And now, Georgia is poised to tip into the Democrats' column, with Jon LEADING in the polls in his race for U.S. Senate. It's why Mitch McConnell's super PAC is spending more against Jon than any other Democratic U.S Senate candidate in the country. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Friend, victory in Georgia is so much more important than being able to color Georgia blue on a map. It's about pushing to expand Medicaid and helping half a million Georgians gain insurance, and safeguarding protections for the 1.8 million Georgians like me with pre-existing conditions. It's about putting families and small businesses at the front of the line for once. And about rebuilding our economy with historic investments in clean energy and infrastructure. I can tell you from experience, friend: Jon is the real deal. He's in this fight because he truly cares about each and every Georgian, regardless of their political affiliation. Because that's what he learned from his mentor, Congressman John Lewis: that we are all brothers and sisters. And with history on our doorstep here in Georgia, we need your help more than ever. Jon is under attack like never before; Mitch McConnell and Jon's opponent David Perdue will stoop low to try to stop us. "" | "" With your help, together we can get it done, Jake Best Press Secretary Jon Ossoff for Senate | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20in=20Office?=
subject: Green NOT Greed
body:
Move your money out of fossil fuels | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Hey,

It's primary day in Sen. Ed Markey's race against Rep. Joe Kennedy in Massachusetts. This election matters not just for our Democracy but also for the survival of our planet. Senator Markey co-authored the Green New Deal (GND) resolution and he is one of our most prominent climate activists in Washington.

Moms in Office support the re-election of Senator Ed Markey because he has championed the kind of policies for future generations that have our children's best interest at heart. Policies and resolutions like the GND will ensure that our children can grow up in a world where they can thrive.

**To be quite frank-politicians who are enabling climate change to continue are being reckless with our children's future.**

This is why we started a climate change blog series that will focus on politicians who are championing change for our families and partners who make it easier for all of us to do to our part.

It's not just our politicians in Washington that are enabling climate change to continue, it is also up to us to make sure that our daily habits are in line with our values.

**So, what's the deal with the Green New Deal? Today, let's look at divesting from fossil fuels in plain English. **

Since the Paris Agreement was signed, banks around the world financed fossil fuel projects in the amount that exceeds $1.9 trillion. The top 4 banks with the largest fossil fuel investments are based in the United States.

_“When you use a mega-bank’s card, you’re bolstering all the things the bank’s loans support, from clearcutting forests to new coal-fired power plants to predatory loans.”

— Fran Teplitz, Green America’s director of social investing programs_

**We hope you will[join us](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=d8c49dec71&e=3f151f8b74) in divesting from fossil fuels because it's our deposits and our hard-earned dollars that help big banks fund fossil fuel projects.**

Support the re-election of Ed Markey. Support the Green New Deal and move your money to a bank that does not use your deposits to squander away our children's future.

Our friends at [Aspiration Bank](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=c7ba3be761&e=3f151f8b74) extended a generous offer to our supporters.

Aspiration offers socially-conscious and sustainable banking services and investment products, so you can make money while making the world a better place. And, unlike the Big Banks, they don’t use your deposits to fund oil pipelines or turn your fees into campaign contributions to the politicians that work against you.

[Sign up here](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=f80312c0c6&e=3f151f8b74) to get $50 when you open an account and Moms in Office founder Simona Grace* will add an additional $50.

[*Terms Apply](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=33dc5474e0&e=3f151f8b74)

Thanks for all that you do! We appreciate your support!

Moms in Office
---
| [Sign Up Here ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=76c78cb783&e=3f151f8b74 "Sign Up Here ")
---
|
---
|
---
# This former D.C. insider is building a bank for ‘forgotten Americans’
["We decided ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=86f6f8138b&e=3f151f8b74)it was the right time because a big part of why we as a country are in the midst of this crisis is because we didn't act boldly enough and quickly enough when we could have to respond to COVID," he said. "We're long past the point of responding quickly [to climate change], but we still have time to respond boldly, and in a big way and for each individual to step up."

"Banks, beset with myriad balance sheet issues following the financial crash, were slow to innovate elsewhere."

[Fortune ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=8143c4851c&e=3f151f8b74)
| | | | | | | | [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=3c2f9d7d11&e=3f151f8b74)
---
| | [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=bf659dce93&e=3f151f8b74)
---
| | [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=1b0671c9aa&e=3f151f8b74)
---
| | [](www.momsinoffice.org)
---
|
---

**Our mailing address is:**
Moms in Office13351 Riverside Dr # 265Sherman Oaks, CA 91423-2542
[Add us to your address book](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/vcard?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/profile?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e&e=3f151f8b74) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e&e=3f151f8b74&c=682c340a5c).

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump visits Kenosha, Wisconsin
body:
President Trump just finished thanking law enforcement officers in Kenosha, Wisconsin, for their efforts helping to quell violence... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=151168be61&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 1, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump visits Kenosha, Wisconsin**

**President Trump** just finished thanking law enforcement officers in Kenosha, Wisconsin, for their efforts helping to quell violence and protect neighborhoods from additional damage after a series of violent riots last week.

**“Law enforcement** has just done such a great job working with the National Guard and working with a lot of people . . . We’re here to show our support for Kenosha,” President Trump said.

**“We’re all** in this together.”

**During his visit,** the President surveyed property damaged from the riots, met with local residents who were affected, toured the Emergency Operations Center, and participated in a roundtable discussion on Wisconsin community safety.

🎬 [**“This is an example of what can happen if you do it right.”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=81fda0e920&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump acted quickly** to send Federal law enforcement support to Wisconsin, putting a sudden stop to the unrest in Kenosha. Although Democratic Governor Tony Evers was slow to accept Federal help, President Trump credited him today for ultimately making the right decision to protect residents’ safety.

**“Once again** , we saw the hijacking of a protest by a hardcore group of radicals,” Attorney General Bill Barr said today. “Out of 175 arrests, 100 were from out of town.”

**Over 200 agents** from the FBI, ATF, and U.S. Marshals Service joined the National Guard in assisting state and local officers with restoring law and order in Kenosha. Across the Nation, Federal law enforcement is coordinating with state and local officials to bring justice to rioters, looters, arsonists, and other criminals praying on our communities.

**For example, Operation Legend** —a Department of Justice-led initiative to fight violent crime in America’s cities—has led to more than 1,000 arrests in less than 2 months. The murder rate in Kansas City, where the operation launched, has been cut by 33 percent, while the murder rate in Chicago has been cut in half over the last month.

**President Trump** once again extended his offer today to help Democrat-run cities that have become overrun with violent rioting. Just last night, far-left “protesters” in Portland [**started a fire in the occupied apartment building**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5d8a436731&e=3ee4985eea) where they believe Democrat Mayor Ted Wheeler lives.

**“To stop the political violence** , we must also confront the radical ideology that includes this violence. Reckless far-left politicians continue to push the destructive message that our Nation and our law enforcement are oppressive or racist,” President Trump said.

**“Actually, we must give** far greater support to our law enforcement . . . They’re fighting to save people they’ve never met in many cases.”

[**Watch the full Kenosha roundtable with President Trump here.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=489d8aa700&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 [**President Trump: We must confront the ideology that spawns violence**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7e777bda09&e=3ee4985eea)
---
